description_long: This hammer features a strikingly bold design with a large, rectangular head composed of two red, ribbed faces and a blue central section. The head is adorned with a circular emblem containing a red diamond and laurel wreath, giving it a distinctive, almost ceremonial appearance. The handle is blue, segmented, and tapers towards the end, with a flared guard near the head for added grip and control. The hammer's head is much wider than the handle, and the ribbed texture on the striking faces suggests enhanced grip or impact dispersion. The overall construction appears solid and robust, suitable for heavy-duty or symbolic use. The color scheme of red and blue, along with the emblem, makes this hammer visually unique and easily recognizable.
description: A large, red and blue hammer with a ribbed rectangular head and a blue segmented handle, featuring a circular emblem on the head. The design is bold, solid, and visually distinctive.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed red faces of the head, the blue central section with a circular emblem, and the segmented blue handle.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rectangular symmetry of the head and the circular marking on the blue central section.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the ribbed texture of the red faces and the width of the hammer head relative to the handle.
description_view_3: Rear-side view showing the solid red back face of the head and the blue handle's flared guard.
attribute_handle_type: Segmented blue plastic handle with a flared guard near the head, straight and smooth with slight ergonomic shaping.
attribute_head_type: Large, rectangular sledge-type head with ribbed red striking faces and a blue central section; both faces are flat and wide for heavy impact.
attribute_brand_or_logo: Circular emblem with a red diamond and laurel wreath on the head; no brand name visible.
